title: Fulbright English Teaching Assistant (ETA) Program
description: Academic-year English Teaching Assistant placement through the U.S. Fulbright Program, funded by the U.S. Department of State. ETA posts run in roughly 80 countries worldwide, including Vietnam, Mongolia, Kazakhstan, the Philippines, Mexico, Brazil, and Argentina among many others -- exact placement country, stipend, and program length vary by country and are assigned through each country's Fulbright Commission. Provides a monthly stipend and travel expenses for the academic year.
org: U.S. Fulbright Program / Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs

title: Art Omi: Artists Residency 2027
description: Open call for artists from any country who have never previously visited the United States; includes a travel grant and a $500 stipend for a residency at the Omi International Arts Center in upstate New York.
visaNote: US visa arrangements are the resident's responsibility; Art Omi provides an invitation letter to support the application.
